reviews.comment:
Buen servicio.  Lo único mal es que solo una isla tiene aire comprimido para inflar los neumáticos.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The only downside is that only one pump has compressed air for inflating tires.

reviews.comment:

Excellent service. Always attentive. Highly recommended for coffee, a meal, or to fill up with gas.

reviews.comment:
Cargo el tanque con infinia todos los domingos a la noche. Hoy domingo 6/02/22 fui a inflar la rueda de la bici para verme con mis amigos y el supervisor no me dejo inflar la rueda de la bici. Después hacen una publicidad donde dicen que YPF mueve el país cuando ni siquiera te dejan inflar una bici

(Translated by Google)
I fill up my tank with Infinia every Sunday night. Today, Sunday, February 6, 2022, I went to inflate my bike tire to meet up with my friends, and the supervisor wouldn't let me. Then they run an ad saying YPF keeps the country running when they won't even let you inflate a bike tire.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdmJ5Y0dREAE

reviews.comment:
Es una buena estación de Servicio YPF, de la red del Automóvil Club Argentino.  Es pequeña pero está ubicada estratégicamente, y la atención es rápida y atenta.

(Translated by Google)
It's a good YPF service station, part of the Automóvil Club Argentino network. It's small but strategically located, and the service is quick and attentive.
